what: Feature: eri_odk_upload() — bulk-create ODK submissions from a table (ADR-0013, #211)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New eri_odk_upload(data, project_id, form_id, …) — inverse download_odk_form() / eri_odk_sync(): take CSV/Excel table already-collected records (paper backfill, legacy export, download_odk_form(tables = TRUE) result) create submissions existing published ODK Central form, one POST per row. Columns map form fields name using flattening download_odk_form() emits (groups group-field; repeat groups separate "{form_id}-{repeat}" child tables linked PARENT_KEY → parent KEY, per ADR-0010), download round-trips back upload. Idempotent construction. submission’s meta/instanceID derived deterministically key_col (whole row), re-running extract re-derives ids ODK Central rejects duplicates HTTP 409 — reported skipped, never double-loaded. Validate first, report per row. dry_run = TRUE pass checks column reconciliation, required fields, type/format (dates, geopoints, numbers), — best-effort — select-value choice lists (parsed form XML; skipped external/dataset choices), POSTs nothing. real run returns per-row outcome tibble (created / skipped / failed) continues past bad row rather aborting batch. Attachments creation scope (ODK API limitation). Adds dependency xml2. See ADR-0013.

what: Feature: harden analyst attribution + eri_odk_purge() for sandbox cleanup (#175 polish)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: Analyst identity now honest audit trail. ERI_ANALYST_ID unset, governed actions attributed "<os-user> (unverified)" (bare OS username looked like real analyst id), approval logs, catalog registered_by, eri_logs’ analyst column show attribution provisional. team CI run can require configured identity setting ERI_REQUIRE_ANALYST_ID=true, makes governed actions refuse rather fall back. -per-session warning now points options. Surfaced red-team runs. New eri_odk_purge(project_id, form_id, …) hard-deletes ODK registry entry (active already soft-deleted), unlike eri_odk_deregister() soft-deletes preserve sync history. Use tear practice/sandbox registrations don’t linger shared odk/registry.yaml; da-odk-guide cleanup now uses . Flagged fresh-DA red-team run.

what: Fix: eri_dir_delete() prunes the catalog; eri_split_cmr() summarizes skipped sheets (#175 polish)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_dir_delete() now removes data-catalog entries deleted path (new prune_catalog argument, default TRUE Azure deletes), deleting namespace longer leaves dangling rows eri_catalog_verify() flag. Fail-silent — catalog hiccup never blocks delete. Surfaced fresh-Epi red-team run whose sandbox teardown left phantom catalog row. eri_split_cmr() reports sheets schema routes workbook lacks single informational summary (“Skipped N sheets …”) instead deferred pile individual warnings (fresh-DA nit).

what: Data: bundled CMR schemas reconciled to the real country templates (ADR-0012, #175)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: seven bundled CMR schemas (inst/schemas/cmr/{eth,nga,sdn,ssd,uga,tcd,mad}.yaml) regenerated real monthly templates’ structure (sheet names + machine-readable field codes — data values), replacing earlier simplified stand-ins. country now carries actual sheet set disease / data_type routing keys, eri_split_cmr() routes real CMR completely: e.g. uga’s 14 sheets (RB/SCH Treatment, LF MMDP, VHT/Parish/Local-Leaders/Subcounty/MMDP-surgery/MMDP-patient/ Field-Ento/Lab Training, LF Surveys, RB Epi Surveys, RB Ento Surveys); nga adds SCH/STH Treatment + Teacher/Health-Worker/Hope-Group trainings; mad LF-; French tcd/mad keep slug aliases. RB Epi Surveys → oncho/prevalence, RB Ento Surveys → oncho/entomology, LF Surveys → lf/tas, Training sheets (incl. ToT) → combined rblf/training. required_fields now lists real stable (non-monthly) identifier columns.

what: Feature: eri_odk_sync() writes to the research channel (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_odk_sync() now lands submissions data/{country}/{disease}/research/raw/ (.../odk/raw/), recording data_source = "research" + format = "odk" operation log. ODK research channel’s collection format, data_source — retires transitional odk source token new writes (measure assigned later, analyst cleans form final dataset, path carries measure level yet). odk/cmr tokens remain registered reading legacy data removed Phase-3 cutover. da-odk-guide connections-guide updated research paths channel-level eri_approve().

what: Feature: eri_split_cmr() routes a CMR per disease and measure (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New eri_split_cmr(path, country, …) reads every routable sheet CMR monthly report writes data/{country}/{disease}/programmatic/{data_type}/staged/, single Excel fans per-disease, per-measure canonical coordinates. disease comes sheet (RB Treatment → oncho, SCH Treatment → sch, LF MMDP → lf; cross-programme Training sheets route together combined rblf), per-row #…_disease field — holds programme-coverage codes (RB/RBLF/RBLFSCH) — kept column, split , treatment counts never duplicated across diseases. Data staged parsed -(machine-readable #field-code columns; reshape, automated DQ — CMR review manual); eri_approve() promotes disease/measure. dry_run = TRUE returns routing plan without writing. CMR schema gains two per-sheet keys, disease data_type, driving routing. seven registered countries (eth/nga/sdn/ssd/uga English, tcd/mad French) now carry routing keys, eri_split_cmr() works : Treatment sheets → disease’s treatment, LF MMDP → lf/mmdp, Training sheets → combined rblf/training, Surveys → rblf/survey, River Prospection / Fly Collection → oncho/entomology (Drug Inventory SBCC logistics/comms, split). deeper reconciliation bundled schema’s sheet set real template (monthly _jan…_dec columns, larger real sheet set) remains tracked follow-. da-cmr-guide now teaches upload → stage → split → approve, approving disease/measure coordinates instead one combined rblf/cmr bucket.

what: Feature: eri_ingest() stages to the five-axis measure path (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_ingest() now writes cleaned parquet data/{country}/{disease}/{data_source}/{data_type}/staged/ (measure path, just used pick schema), operation/DQ logs land alongside. eri_ingest() → eri_approve(country, disease, data_source, period, data_type = …) now consistent five-axis round-trip. Behaviour change: default data_type = "aggregate", plain eri_ingest(path, country, disease) now stages .../{data_source}/aggregate/staged/ (.../{data_source}/staged/); pass matching data_type eri_approve(). finishes measure--path work ingest entry point foundation CMR per-disease split builds .

what: Feature: eri_approve() signposts the no-measure (four-axis) form (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_approve() runs without data_type, dataset filed catalogued channel level measure recorded NA. legitimate channel-data (e.g. ODK), used silent — indistinguishable forgetting measure. eri_approve() now emits quiet, -per-session cli_inform first time four-axis form used, pointing data_type ADR-0012. Supplying measure silent. Surfaced fresh-DA red-team run.

what: Feature: eri_research_pull() speaks the five-axis model (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4b)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_research_pull() — Epi sourcing entry point — now takes data_source (channel) plus optional data_type (measure), matching coordinates [eri_catalog_query()] reports, study pulls canonical processed data tokens discovery query returns: eri_research_pull("dr", "malaria", "surveillance", "case"). Path construction delegates eri_data_path(), four-axis (channel-) form works . Back-compat: pre-ADR-0012 form channel passed data_type (data_type = "surveillance") still resolves processed path. Surfaced fresh-Epi red-team run one un-migrated step sourcing path. Note: data_source inserted data_type, path argument moves fourth fifth position — pass name (eri_research_pull(path = "spatial/...")), docs already .

what: Feature: the measure (data_type) reaches the human gate and the catalog (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4b)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_approve() gains optional data_type (measure) argument: eri_approve(country, disease, data_source, period, data_type = NULL, …). supplied promotes full five-axis path {country}/{disease}/{data_source}/{data_type}/staged → processed/ records measure approval log, operation log, catalog. third positional argument now named data_source (always carried channel); data_type defaults NULL, existing four-axis calls — eri_approve("dr", "malaria", "surveillance", "2024-W01") — unchanged. data catalog carries data_source column alongside data_type, eri_catalog_register() / eri_catalog_query() gain data_source argument (eri_catalog_register(... , data_source, ... , data_type = NULL); eri_catalog_query(... , data_source = NULL, data_type = NULL, ...)). Four-axis entries leave data_type NA. Legacy positional eri_catalog_register() calls passed channel data_type now pass data_source. log triage reader follows writer: eri_logs() scans four-axis channel-level …/{data_source}/logs/ five-axis measure-level …/{data_source}/{data_type}/logs/ layouts, backlog tibble gains data_source column data_type now meaning measure. eri_logs(country, disease, data_source, data_type = NULL, …) eri_dq_log(result, country, disease, data_source, data_type = NULL, …) rename old third/fourth argument data_source (always held channel) add optional measure. Positional callers passing channel third unchanged.

what: Feature: onboarding scaffolders emit the 4-part schema identity (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4a)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_onboard_disease() eri_onboard_country() now write schema skeletons named ADR-0012 identity {country}_{disease}_{data_source}_{data_type}.yaml data_source / data_type header fields: mda → programmatic / treatment, prevalence → research / prevalence, surveillance → surveillance / {data_type} (new eri_onboard_country(data_type = "aggregate") argument). freshly onboarded program consistent migrated bundled schemas loads via 4-arg load_dq_schema(). DA onboarding guide updated match.

what: Feature: eri_ingest() is a general, sandbox-runnable ingest core (ADR-0012, #175 phase 3a)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_ingest() longer requires hsp-mal pipeline registry registered country, longer forces write legacy projects blob. reads, DQ-checks, stages data/{country}/{disease}/{data_source}/staged/ data — guides can finally teach throwaway sandbox. Signature: eri_ingest(path, country, disease, data_source = "surveillance", data_type = "aggregate", …). legacy projects-blob dual-write now opt-mirror_pipeline argument (default NULL); legacy callers pass mirror_pipeline = "hsp-mal". .eri_schema_country_map hack retired (schemas code-prefixed now). mirror bits transitional removed Phase-3 hsp-mal cutover.

what: Feature: DQ schemas keyed by (country, disease, data_source, data_type) (ADR-0012, #175 phase 2)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: Bundled schemas renamed {country}_{disease}_{data_source}_{data_type}.yaml carry data_source / format fields. data_source surveillance / programmatic / research; ODK research format CMR programmatic format (channel, lane). Country codes normalised (ug → uga) disease names (rb → oncho). load_dq_schema() gains four-argument identity form load_dq_schema(country, disease, data_source, data_type) (measure optional research). legacy two-argument form — second argument held combined key like "malaria_case" "lf_tas" — still resolves via alias new name, existing callers keep working. DR HT malaria keep case aggregate surveillance schema (distinct, duplicates). Part #175 migration (ADR-0012). Deferred phase 4: eri_onboard_* scaffolders adding--program / epi-analytics / da-ingest guides still emit/teach old {country}_{disease}_{type} names; keep working via alias shim swept four-part identity rest docs/onboarding pass.

what: Feature: five-axis data addressing — data_source vs data_type (ADR-0012, #175 phase 1)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: canonical path gains measure axis: data/{country}/{disease}/{data_source}/{data_type}/{layer}/. data_source channel (surveillance, programmatic, odk); data_type measure (case, aggregate, treatment, tas, …). See ADR-0012. eri_data_path() now takes (country, disease, data_source, data_type, layer, filename). legacy four-axis form eri_data_path(country, disease, data_source, layer) still resolves migration (detected fourth argument layer keyword), existing callers keep working. New eri_data_model() shows registry known data_source / data_type / format values. axes extensible: unregistered value warns rather errors, onboarding new source/measure never blocks data — first step ADR-0012 migration close #175.

what: Docs: one vocabulary for addressing data and schemas
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: new README section (“data addressed”) names four path axes — country / disease / data_type / layer — clarifies DQ schema key (e.g. malaria_case, passed load_dq_schema()) data_type. eri_data_path()’s error now says explicitly schema key passed data_type belongs. Phase 1 ADR-0011; bundled schema names unified one convention follow-(#175). Fixes user-facing half fresh-user red-team finding.

what: Improvement: eri_spatial_reconcile() surfaces the geocoded admin unit for review
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: function now returns one geocoded_<admin_col> column per admin level, holding admin units geocoded point fell (point--polygon). filled every geocoded row landed inside polygon — including geocoded_review rows — flagged row shows exactly geocoded location disagreed , can resolve without re-running spatial join hand. (NA matched, unresolved, outside-polygon rows.) Fixes fresh-user red-team finding (#174).

what: Improvement: a one-time warning when ERI_ANALYST_ID is unset
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: Governed actions (approve, ingest, ODK sync, catalog/registry writes, research operations, log resolution) stamp shared audit trail analyst’s identity. ERI_ANALYST_ID unset empty, erifunctions still falls back OS username — now warns per session know approvals logs attributed fallback rather analyst id. (Previously explicitly-empty ERI_ANALYST_ID stamped empty actor; now falls back .) Identity resolution centralised single internal helper. Fixes fresh-user red-team finding (#171).

what: Docs: flag the steps you can’t rehearse on a sandbox
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: ODK guide now says front creating project, uploading form, submitting practice entries happen ODK Central web interface, R. CMR guide spells throwaway-sandbox path eri_stage_cmr() / approve (require registered RB-expansion country); parsing step hands-. connections guide notes eri_list()’s name column holds full path full_names = FALSE returns just leaf filenames. Fresh-user findings (#177).

what: Fix: friendlier schema discovery and an accurate research-function reference
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: load_dq_schema() now lists available bundled schema keys find one asked — load_dq_schema("dr", "malaria") points dr_malaria_case instead bare “schema found.” error. README’s research-projects reference now includes eri_research_scaffold(), eri_research_status(), eri_research_tag() (previously omitted) clarifies eri_research_scaffold() (new standalone project repository, ADR-0006) vs eri_research_init() (initialise project current directory). DQ guide names disease argument load_dq_schema() examples notes schema key (e.g. malaria_case) distinct layer-path data_type. Fresh-user findings (#176). (deeper data_type-vs-schema-key vocabulary unification tracked #175.)

what: Improvement: dq_report() shows the offending values, not just counts
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: “Flags Requiring Review” section now prints three example offending values row numbers issue — e.g. allowed_values: 2 rows [species] (e.g. P.vivax (row 4); P.ovale (row 2)) — +N suffix , closing pointer result$flags full row-level detail. Previously printed count column, analyst open result$flags see fix. Fixes fresh-user red-team finding (#178).

what: Fix: eri_catalog_query() no longer says “Catalog is empty” for a no-match filter
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: filtered eri_catalog_query() matches nothing now reports “catalog entries match specified filters” — even catalog happens entries — instead old “Catalog empty.”, make filtered lookup look like wiped shared catalog. unfiltered query truly empty catalog now reads “data catalog entries yet.” Fixes fresh-user red-team finding (#173).

what: Fix: cleaner console output from eri_read() and the file-writing helpers
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_read() longer prints readr’s column-specification block reading CSV (now reads show_col_types = FALSE / suppresses message local Azure paths), read longer erupts engine noise middle pipeline. side-effecting helpers (eri_write(), eri_upload(), eri_dir_create(), eri_delete(), eri_dir_delete()) now return invisibly, scripted / Rscript runs longer print stray NULL lines steps. fixes come fresh-user red-team (#172).

what: Docs: guides clean up with eri_dir_delete()/eri_delete(), not raw AzureStor
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: Every guide’s “Clean ” section now tears sandbox exported eri_dir_delete() / eri_delete() instead AzureStor::delete_storage_dir() / delete_storage_file(). keeps analyst inside erifunctions one operation likely send Azure Storage Explorer, rather dropping raw blob calls. Fixes fresh-user red-team’s top finding (#170).

what: Feature: ODK forms with repeat groups are now captured in full
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: ODK Central exports form repeat groups multiple tables — parent table (one row per submission) plus one child table per repeat group, linked PARENT_KEY → parent’s KEY. Previously download_odk_form() read parent CSV eri_odk_sync() wrote single Parquet, repeat data silently dropped. download_odk_form() gains tables argument. default (tables = FALSE) unchanged — returns parent table single tibble. tables = TRUE returns named list every table export (parent first, named table’s CSV). eri_odk_sync() now writes one Parquet per table {country}/{disease}/odk/raw/ — single- table forms unchanged (still exactly one Parquet); repeat forms produce {form_id}.parquet plus {form_id}-{repeat}.parquet repeat group. New bundled XLSForm inst/extdata/odk-test-form-repeat.xlsx (river-prospection form repeated larva_sample group) new “Forms repeat groups” section ODK guide (vignettes/da-odk-guide.Rmd) showing parent/child tables, PARENT_KEY join, one-Parquet-per-table sync.

what: Fix: eri_onboard_cmr() creates the canonical rblf/cmr/ directories
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_onboard_cmr() now creates CMR Azure directories {country}/rblf/cmr/{raw,staged,processed}/ — location eri_stage_cmr() eri_approve() actually use — instead per-disease folders like {country}/{disease}/cmr/, never matched pipeline. diseases argument replaced create_dirs (logical): CMR RB-expansion programmes filed combined rblf code (RB + LF), split disease.

what: Documentation: a monthly CMR upload guide for data analysts
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New article — “Uploading processing monthly country report (CMR)” (vignettes/da-cmr-guide.Rmd). Data Analyst monthly job: upload filed CMR Excel projects blob, eri_stage_cmr() staged/, parse sheet eri_ingest_cmr() (machine-readable #field-code row — language-neutral, parses English French templates alike), eri_approve() processed/. parsing step run live new bundled synthetic example report (inst/extdata/cmr-example.xlsx); Azure steps shown representative output. Completes docs/guides.md role × task matrix.

title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New article — “Catching anomalies new surveillance extract” (vignettes/epi-dq-guide.Rmd). run--live, offline walkthrough anomaly detectors epidemiologists: run_dq_checks(), chain add_anomaly_pct_change() (case spikes), add_anomaly_gaps() (missing reporting weeks), add_anomaly_consistency() (cross-field rules), add_anomaly_spatial() (unrecognized admin names) synthetic multi-period extract, interpret flag. Complements dq-pipeline.Rmd reference (documents schema + detector mechanics).

title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New article — “Reconciling free-text localities admin units” (vignettes/epi-reconcile-guide.Rmd). run--live walkthrough eri_spatial_reconcile() epidemiologists: match messy place names canonical admin units offline, geocode residual (keyless OpenStreetMap), interpret trust-guarded reconcile_status (matched / geocoded / geocoded_review / unresolved). Fills gap spatial-workflow.Rmd left — vignette never covered reconciliation.

title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_logs() – new. Reads structured operation logs (written eri_ingest(), eri_approve(), eri_stage(), eri_odk_sync(), …) new data-quality logs across {country}/{disease}/{data_type}/logs/ data/ blob, returns triage backlog tibble. Filter status ("error", "needs_review", …), operation, analyst, since; scope one dataset scan whole system. logs live Azure, backlog shared — teammate can see exactly failed pick left . eri_dq_log() – new. Persists run_dq_checks()’s $flags log backlog data-quality issues durable discoverable, just -session. eri_ingest() now calls automatically DQ checks. eri_logs_resolve() – new. Marks log entry handled (records //note triage block) drops open backlog without deleting record. New article — “Triaging error & data-quality log backlog” (vignettes/da-logs-guide.Rmd) walks workflow atlantis sandbox. Closes last open Data Analyst row docs/guides.md (previously blocked eri_logs() function gap).

what: Documentation: an onboarding guide for data analysts
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New article — “Onboarding new country, disease, data type” (vignettes/da-onboard-guide.Rmd). prequel ingest ODK guides: Data Analyst stands DQ schema + raw/staged/processed folders new program data flows. Covers three scaffolding paths — eri_onboard_country() (surveillance), eri_onboard_cmr() (CMR), eri_onboard_disease() (NTD MDA + prevalence) — plus dry_run preview eri_schema_validate() (valid + broken→fixed example), atlantis sandbox. Complements existing “Adding new program” vignette (covers contributing finished schema package).

title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New article — “Connecting Azure, ODK Central, SharePoint, Teams” (vignettes/connections-guide.Rmd). single reference every external connection erifunctions makes: authenticate service, “confirm works” check per service, one consolidated .Renviron template, brief automation/CI (service-principal / token / webhook) callouts, troubleshooting table. role guides now point instead re-explaining auth.

what: Documentation: a worked ODK Central guide for data analysts
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New article — “Working ODK Central” (vignettes/da-odk-guide.Rmd). hands-, run--live walkthrough full ODK loop Data Analyst: connect init_odk_connection(), stand practice form, monitor eri_survey_status(), manage collectors update_odk_app_user_role() / eri_odk_bulk_users(), register , eri_odk_sync() submissions governed raw → staged → approved pipeline — clean . package now ships small practice XLSForm (inst/extdata/odk-test-form.xlsx) reader uploads sandbox test project. eri_survey_status() fix. form-metadata request now sends X-Extended-Metadata: true header, total_submissions last_submission_at populated. Previously fields omitted ODK Central total_submissions always 0.

what: Documentation: a worked ingest guide for data analysts
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New article — “Ingesting surveillance dataset: raw approved” (vignettes/da-ingest-guide.Rmd). copy-paste, hands-walkthrough core Data Analyst job: take dataset raw/ → staged/ → processed/ pipeline, eri_approve() human gate. reader stands make-believe country (Atlantis) private sandbox, invents small malaria line-list, authors DQ schema, runs run_dq_checks(), stages approves — handles second extract seeded errors (impossible age unknown district) learn difference auto-corrections review flags, deleting whole sandbox. Runs live laptop leaves trace. Flips matching row docs/guides.md shipped. eri_catalog_remove() – new. Deletes file’s entry data catalog (_catalog/data_catalog.yaml) path — inverse eri_catalog_register(), processed file deleted superseded. (Used new guide’s clean-step.)

what: Documentation: a worked research guide for epidemiologists
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: New article — “complete research workflow epidemiologists” (vignettes/epi-research-guide.Rmd). copy-paste, start--finish walkthrough whole research lifecycle — scaffold project, put version control reproducibility check, add data metadata, source , analyse, save outputs figures, tag citable version, pause resume weeks later, take updated dataset, tidy . uses public mtcars dataset (initial == 0 subset → expanded full dataset simulate new data arriving), epidemiologist can run live laptop delete every resource end. Supersedes older, partly-stale research-workflow vignette. New docs/guides.md — index task guides (one per user role × task) tracking exists still missing, seeding framework epi guide first .

what: Console output: clearer, calmer, and tunable
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: non-developer users stack anonymous progress bars looks like package hung. console output overhauled package-wide: One informative progress bar instead many. Multi-file transfers (e.g. eri_research_snapshot() uploading 17 files, eri_research_pull()) now show single bar names current file position (3/17), rather stack AzureStor’s anonymous |====| 100% bars. native per-transfer bar suppressed everywhere replaced cli output; kept genuinely large single file (e.g. ~100 MB LandScan raster) long download still shows life. Summary end-caps. Multi-step operations (eri_research_tag(), eri_approve(), eri_ingest()) finish tidy ✔-titled key/value summary happened. eri_verbosity() – new. Controls chatty console : "full" (default – step--step confirmations summaries) "quiet" (headline results, warnings, errors ). Set whole project via options(erifunctions.verbosity = "quiet") .Rprofile, per session eri_verbosity("quiet"), via ERIFUNCTIONS_VERBOSITY environment variable.

title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_research_scaffold(): generated reproducibility-check workflow now installs geospatial/Azure system libraries (gdal/proj/geos/udunits, curl/openssl) uses Posit Public Package Manager binaries (use-public-rspm: true). Previously renv::restore() Ubuntu runner tried build curl (sf geospatial stack) source -dev libraries present failed, check red real research project. Validated dr_irs_2026 reference repo.

title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_spatial_promote() – new: explicit gate pushing boundary cleaned research project shared canonical spatial/ store, recording promotion (, , , whether replaced existing boundary, prior version archived) research.yaml. Replacing existing canonical boundary requires overwrite = TRUE. eri_spatial_upload() now overwrite-safe: refuses clobber existing canonical boundary (shared cleaned data many users pull figures) unless overwrite = TRUE, points eri_spatial_promote() deliberate replacement. Reads canonical/cached .rds format now supported alongside shapefiles. Canonical overwrites archived. deliberate overwrite = TRUE (via either eri_spatial_upload() eri_spatial_promote()) first copies prior canonical boundary spatial/_archive/<timestamp>/, replacing shared reference data reversible (ADR-0009). eri_research_status() now also reports boundary promotions project made canonical (summarised separately inbound input table). eri_research_status() – new: manifest every input project depends (source, pulled_at, update count, whether prior version archived) plus output/snapshot/tag counts. check_remote = TRUE flags inputs whose Azure source newer local copy. eri_research_pull() now update--archival: re-pull moves prior local version data/_archive/<timestamp>/ records , dedups pulled_data (re-pull source replaces record instead appending duplicate, collapses pre-existing duplicates). eri_spatial_load(cache = TRUE) inherits . eri_spatial_pop() now caches LandScan raster project reuses rather re-downloading ~100 MB every call; records provenance run inside research project. eri_landscan_list() longer warns LandScan directory simply exist yet (returns empty tibble quietly). ADLS-safe directory creation now centralized. trailing-slash trim + missing-parent creation previously local R/research.R (.eri_ensure_azure_dir()) promoted DAL .eri_create_azure_dir(); azure_io("create") every nested-path write site (artifacts.R, catalog.R, odk_registry.R, onboarding.R, cmr.R, templates.R, research.R) now route instead calling AzureStor::create_storage_dir() directly. Robustness/ consistency fix PR #147 review.

what: Azure access: zero-config interactive auth + ADLS Gen2 fixes
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: get_azure_storage_connection() ships working defaults interactive (browser) auth, analysts epidemiologists configure nothing: app_id defaults Microsoft’s first-party Azure CLI public client tenant_id / resource_endpoint team’s Entra tenant eridev ADLS endpoint. remain overridable via existing ERIFUNCTIONS_* env vars; service-principal secret stays env-. One Microsoft sign-covers Azure Storage (, later, Microsoft Graph). Fixed research-project directory creation ADLS Gen2: paths trailing slash returned HTTP 400 (request URI invalid) intermediate parents created. New internal .eri_ensure_azure_dir() trims trailing slashes creates missing parent level; R/research.R directory sites use . eri_research_scaffold() normalizes trailing slash dest, partial-failure message now explains recover (finish eri_research_init() place, unlink() + re-scaffold).

what: V2 Phase 1 – dr_irs vertical slice (in progress)
title: erifunctions (development version)
text: eri_research_tag() – bind frozen data snapshot, analysis git commit, input provenance, output manifest immutable, citable tag Azure, recorded research.yaml. Makes tagged analysis reproducible citation, including across data updates. Tags immutable auto-create snapshot none exists. (#135) eri_spatial_load(cache = TRUE) – cache admin boundary research project record provenance (delegating eri_research_pull()), read local copy, study’s spatial inputs reproducible frozen eri_research_tag(). See ADR-0007. (#133) plus standard research scaffold via eri_research_init(). Implements ADR-0006. (#136) keyed method (e.g. method = "google") selected without API key set, eri_spatial_reconcile() now aborts front guidance store key user .Renviron (e.g. GOOGLEGEOCODE_API_KEY), rather surfacing lower-level geocoder error. (#143) Geocodes now trusted (status "geocoded", names assigned) service flag partial/low-confidence match assigned coarser admin units agree parent levels supplied. Otherwise row flagged "geocoded_review": coordinates kept inspection analyst’s names left untouched. Guards geocoders best-guess fabricated unmatched locality plausible point. (#145)

title: erifunctions 0.9.0
text: Documentation project-infrastructure ; changes package functions. Marks start V2 effort. docs/roadmap.md – version-controlled V2 development roadmap (Phases 0-5) docs/adr/ – architecture decision records (single-package vs split, concurrency-safe metadata, token-derived identity, DuckDB query layer, pull--process, research--repos) docs/vision.md – founding vision brief, moved gitignored sandbox/ CLAUDE.md – working memory conventions contributors (human AI) _pkgdown.yml + .github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml – grouped-reference documentation site, published https://thecartercenter.github.io/erifunctions/ README version banner CI status badges (R-CMD-check, pkgdown) Cleared pre-existing R CMD check warning notes (non-ASCII source, utils::tail import, CONTRIBUTING.md .Rbuildignore); bumped CI actions checkout@v5 main branch protection requiring R-CMD-check pkgdown gates

title: erifunctions 0.6.0
text: Spatial data management (R/spatial.R) - eri_spatial_load() — read admin boundary RDS Azure (data/spatial/{country}/adm{level}.rds) - eri_spatial_upload() — validate (CRS, required name column, empty geometries) push local shapefile Azure - eri_bbox_expand() — expand bounding box metres direction (port sirfunctions::f.expand.bbox()) - eri_spatial_join() — point--polygon join; drops rows NA coordinates warning - eri_landscan_upload() — upload LandScan raster Azure; validates year exact filename convention - eri_landscan_list() — list available LandScan years Azure; returns tibble sorted descending - eri_spatial_pop() — extract population totals shapefile LandScan via exactextractr; auto-selects latest year none given Visual style system (R/style.R) - eri_color_scheme() — return named colour vector malaria.incidence, lf.status, oncho.status, activities, dq.flag - eri_plot_theme() — return ggplot2 theme preset map, epicurve, map.inset Standard maps (R/maps.R) - eri_map_choropleth() — fill choropleth optional scale bar north arrow - eri_map_incidence() — malaria incidence rate map automatic 0 / <1 / 1-10 / >=10 binning - eri_map_points() — overlay point data shapefile base map - eri_map_inset() — compose main map country-context inset via cowplot Epi core analytics (R/epi.R) - eri_incidence_rate() — vectorised cases / population × multiplier; returns NA zero/missing populations - eri_epiweek_date() — convert year + epiweek Date; supports CDC Sunday-start ISO Monday-start - eri_study_week() — integer study week relative index date - eri_epidemic_curve() — ggplot2 epidemic curve day/week/month/year optional grouping faceting - eri_case_summary() — grouped case counts line-list aggregate data optional date filtering LF programme functions (R/epi_lf.R) - eri_lf_pooled_prev() — pooled prevalence pool-screening data: 1 - ((1 - npos/npool)^(1/pool_size)) - eri_lf_program_levels() — ordered 5-level /GPELF programme status vector - eri_lf_tas_summary() — group-level TAS positivity table (n %) individual result data - eri_lf_status_map() — choropleth coloured LF programme status OEPA oncho functions (R/epi_oncho.R) - eri_oncho_program_levels() — ordered 5-level OEPA programme status vector - eri_oncho_status_map() — choropleth coloured OEPA oncho programme status

title: erifunctions 0.5.0
text: Artifact registry (R/artifacts.R) - eri_artifact_upload() – upload non-standard reference file artifacts/{type}/{name}/ Azure register artifacts/_registry.yaml - eri_artifact_list() – return tibble registered artifacts, filtered type; excludes archived entries default - eri_artifact_pull() – download artifact local destination; auto-records usage research.yaml present - eri_artifact_archive() – soft-delete (sets archived: true; file preserved Azure) Research project scaffolding (R/research.R) - eri_research_init() – scaffold local dirs (data/, figs/, outputs/), write research.yaml manifest, create Azure project directory - eri_research_resume() – re-read research.yaml print session summary (last pull, last log, snapshot count); call top work session - eri_research_log() – append timestamped free-text entry research.yaml log (lab notebook) - eri_research_list() – list research projects research/ Azure - eri_research_pull() – pull canonical processed data Azure path local project provenance tracking - eri_research_upload_figure() – upload figure research/{project}/outputs/figs/ record manifest - eri_research_upload_output() – serialize R object via qs2 upload research/{project}/outputs/ - eri_research_snapshot() – freeze full data/ directory timestamped Azure snapshot _manifest.yaml Template management (R/templates.R) - eri_template_list() – list available templates (bundled + Azure-hosted); falls back bundled-Azure error - eri_template_pull() – copy named template (bundled Azure) local destination - eri_template_upload() – upload .qmd .R template Azure register team sharing Research Quarto template - inst/templates/eri_research_workflow.qmd – epidemiologist research workflow template; pull eri_template_pull("eri_research_workflow") Smoke tests - tests/testthat/test-smoke.R – live integration test suite (skipped CI); covers data analyst epidemiologist workflows end--end real Azure ODK infrastructure; enable Sys.setenv(ERI_SMOKE_TESTS = "true")

title: erifunctions 0.5.0

title: erifunctions 0.4.0
text: ODK form registry - eri_odk_register() — register ODK form shared Azure registry (odk/registry.yaml) - eri_odk_deregister() — soft-delete registered form (preserves sync history) - eri_odk_list_registered() — list active forms tibble ODK sync - eri_odk_sync() — download new submissions registered form write Azure parquet Survey health - eri_survey_status() — fetch live submission counts recency one form, forms project, projects; S3 class cli-based print method Bulk user management - eri_odk_bulk_users() — read CSV assign/remove/create actions, run pre-flight validation (collects errors touching API), execute; dry_run = TRUE previews without mutating Data catalog - eri_catalog_register() — upsert processed-layer file entry _catalog/data_catalog.yaml - eri_catalog_query() — filter catalog entries country, disease, data_type, layer, period - eri_catalog_verify() — check entry exists Azure; updates last_verified_at - eri_approve() now automatically registers promoted file catalog Onboarding - eri_onboard_country() — write surveillance DQ schema YAML template working directory create three-layer Azure blob directories new country/disease - eri_onboard_cmr() — write CMR schema YAML template locally; optionally create CMR Azure dirs - eri_schema_validate() — validate local YAML schema file; returns tidy tibble structural issues Analyst workflow - inst/templates/eri_daily_workflow.qmd — Quarto template covering full analyst daily loop (connections, survey health, sync, review, approve); copy project file.copy(system.file("templates/eri_daily_workflow.qmd", package = "erifunctions"), ".")
